# seerr_plex_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr Plex settings via /api/v1/settings/plex.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_plex_settings" "settings" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip` (String) The IP address or hostname of the Plex server.
- `name` (String) The name of the Plex server.
- `port` (Number) The port of the Plex server.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
- `use_ssl` (Boolean) Whether to use SSL for the connection.
